title: Job Opening Teacher at TeamLease Skills University

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at TeamLease Skills University
jsonLd.description:
Join the TeamLease Skills University family as a Teacher in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TeamLease Skills University:
TeamLease Skills University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
